purpose: Premium fragrance bottle hero shot with luxury staging. Saudi oud market specialty.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Luxury fragrance photography of {fragrance_descriptor} bottle staged on dark wooden surface with traditional oud wood chips visible, soft warm amber lighting from upper right, brass and gold details in surroundings, hyper-realistic glass bottle reflections and oud wood texture, shot on 100mm macro at f/8, premium luxury Saudi aesthetic, no text, no watermark, no people {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, defend. Source code in research corpus: R05. Saudi adaptation guidance: Most culturally specific fragrance chain for Saudi market. Oud wood chips essential prop signaling traditional Saudi fragrance heritage. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per month luxury fragrance.
